lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you train my cat to be a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you train my cat to be a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meeow Meeeoow!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: A heroic cat like yours needs a heroic name, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Shall we rename it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So cat, what do you think of the name?

lines.speaker: Kitty
lines.text: Miaaow! (Transcript missing - Catspeak amulet edit)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about wily cats?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You already have a mature cat, look after that first.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I can only train overgrown cats into wily cats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you rename my cat?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hey [player name], you finally got around to naming me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I took so long, [cat name], it took a while to come up with a name for you.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaaow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about wily cats?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I'll only help you name wily or lazy cats. Bring me one and I'll help you out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the pits?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Here take this, you might find it useful.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: What do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any pointers for me and my cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would be the best tactic to adopt then?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will not risk my cat's life.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very defensive strategy

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself, cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In the Port Sarim pits, your cat will become happier and fitter after fighting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about Wily cats?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: They're tougher, stronger and faster than other kinds of cats. They have superior hunting skills and can even catch butterflies and kalphite larvae.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are there any drawbacks to owning them?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Wily cats need lots more exercise, otherwise they'll get fat and lazy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the best way to exercise them?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Bring it hunting or take it to the Rat Pits regularly.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Try and keep it happy too, wily cats can be a little nasty when they're cranky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happens if I neglect my cat? Not that I would!

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: It'll get fat and lazy and become much worse at hunting. Plus, everyone will know you're a bad cat trainer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I retrain my lazy cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Yes, you can get your lazy cat back in shape with lots of rat catching. But you really shouldn't let things get that bad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's the poem going?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Ah yes, the poem... your performance was incredibly inspiring. I think it'll be a real masterpiece...

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Just as soon as I get around to writing it all down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, the face said that you were looking to talk with me.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Indeed, word has gotten to me from our other ratcatcher chapters that you are quite a talent.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I can't take all the credit, I've had more than a little help from my cat.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Modesty, a trait seldom displayed by adventurers these days.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Too many more like you and I'll lose half of my business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is that?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Epic poems of bravery and heroics aren't usually commissioned by the shy and retiring.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Smokin' Joe said that you know lots about training wily cats.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Indeed I do. It's for this very reason that I requested to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you will show me how to turn my cat into a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Sighs.*

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: No I need you to carry out just one task for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well experience has taught me to expect as much, what must I do?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Nothing too difficult, just rid the port of every single rat, with just one action.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Deadly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why? Why one stroke, why not a slow eradication?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I want to write a new poem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am touched that you want to write an epic poem about me, but why can't you write the poem about seagulls or daffodils or something?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Well seagulls rarely make good central characters. They're a bit too ... uhm.... flighty.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Besides the poem is about me not you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I don't follow.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I myself carried out the very same feat once upon a time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why do you need me to repeat your most heroic of feats?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: It's all about objectivity and integrity. I need to be utterly divorced from the process.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... ok, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So can you tell me how you went about achieving this?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: No. Therein lies the challenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *Sigh* Why does it always have to be like this?

sections.title: Before ridding the port of rats

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You haven't completed the task yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do again?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Rid the port of all its rats with one action.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get to it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I know how to carry out the task.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Has the face being telling tall tales again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh no, she didn't say a word.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really she didn't.

sections.title: Once the rats have been taken care of

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ha! I did it. Did you see me?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Yes I saw that, now what can I do for you? Don't keep me overly long, I'm trying to complete my poem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me how to train my cat into a wily cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I can only train overgrown cats into wilycats.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You already have a mature cat, look after that first.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You should really name your cat.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You already have a mature cat, look after that first.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: I can only train overgrown cats into wilycats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you rename my cat?

lines.text: Hey [username], you finally got around to naming me.

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Miaaow!

lines.speaker: Felkrash

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: In the Port Sarim pits, your cat will become happier and fitter after fighting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about Wily cats?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Of course, of course, they're the highest form of cat that I know of.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: They're tougher, stronger and faster than other variations of cat, they can catch butterflies and kalphite larva and are far superior to any other type of cat at hunting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So is there any drawbacks to owning them?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Wily cats need looking after or else they get fat and lazy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do I look after them then?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: The key is to keep it active, bring it hunting or to the ratpits regularly.

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Try keep it happy too, they can be a little nasty when they're cranky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happens if I neglect my cat.. not that I would or anything?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: They would get fat and lazy, be much worse at hunting and would show you up as a really poor cat trainer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I retrain my lazy cat?

lines.speaker: Felkrash
lines.text: Yes you can get your lazy cat back in shape with a lot of rat catching, but you really shouldn't let it get into that state in the first place.
